protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: cells were washed twice with PBS and then exposed to CL Buffer... (0.25% Igepal CA-630)... at room temperature (~22 °C)... lysates... subjected to RT-qPCR analysis.

protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: The soluble fraction was obtained either by... ultracentrifugation (208,000 × g)... or... Amicon Ultra... by centrifugation... after... CL Buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl... 0.25% Igepal CA-630...).

protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: Cell lysates were prepared using a non-ionic detergent lysis buffer... 1% Igepal CA-630...

protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: Total RNA was purified from cell lysates... using the RNeasy Mini kit (Qiagen) according to the “cleanup” protocol supplied with the kit.
